en: The antonym of wide is narrow.
The antonym of true is false.
The antonym of always is never.
The antonym of quick is slow.
The antonym of earn is spend.
The antonym of create is destroy.
The antonym of laugh is cry.
The antonym of freeze is melt.
The antonym of neat is untidy.
The antonym of busy is idle.
The antonym of humble is proud.
The antonym of loud is soft.
The antonym of back is front.
